description:
Parent epic: V3 E7: Errors, debugging, and inspection

Source task 3/8 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Add prompt-preview inspection if missing or incomplete.

Epic closure criteria:
- users can answer what happened in a turn without reading logs
- errors are normalized, readable, and safe to display
- debugging output is structured, bounded, and safe by default

comments.text: Added explicit prompt_preview data to request summaries, including bounded system/user prompt previews, message count, and tool names. Covered both completed and pending live request summaries.

title: E7: Add prompt-preview inspection if missing or incomplete
